title: Overview
text:
Welcome to the my-first-graft graft. This template combines a uv-managed Python package with Quarto documentation and Jupyter notebooks.



Python package: uv-managed project at src/my_first_graft/
Documentation: Quarto site with navbar and sidebar navigation
Pre-rendered notebooks: Jupyter notebooks demonstrating package usage
Example code: Simple helpers including greet and show_dataframe




Install dependencies and render the documentation:
uv sync
uv run quarto render --no-execute
Preview the site:
make preview
# or manually: open _site/index.html



Import and use the package in your Python code:
from my_first_graft import greet, show_dataframe
greet("Quarto")

show_dataframe()
For a complete example, see notebook.ipynb.

title: Jupyter Example
text:
Quick check that the graft package imports and runs.

from my_first_graft import greet, show_dataframe

greet("branch builder")


show_dataframe()
